descriptions.death_group: Requires a high group average, a tight top three, and at least three contender-rated teams.
descriptions.balanced_group: Flags groups without a large favorite gap or with a compressed rating spread.
descriptions.surprise_candidate: Uses only prematch rating, ranking, and form fields available before the match.
descriptions.jornada3_trap: Requires standings_before_match and only applies to matchday 3.
descriptions.points_pressure: Uses only the prior table passed into the engine.
